## TypeScript Configuration

### Root Configuration (`tsconfig.json`)

```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "lib": ["ES2022", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "strict": true,                    ✅
    "noUnusedLocals": true,            ✅
    "noUnusedParameters": true,        ✅
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,✅
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "declaration": true,
    "declarationMap": true,
    "sourceMap": true,
    "composite": true,
    "incremental": true,
    "baseUrl": ".",
    "paths": {
      "@glohib/*": ["services/*/src/*"],
      "@frontend/*": ["frontend/*/src/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": [],
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist", "build", "**/vendor/**"]
}
```

### Frontend Configuration (`frontend/web/tsconfig.json`)

```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,                    ✅
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [{"name": "next"}],
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./src/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": ["next-env.d.ts", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx", ".next/types/**/*.ts"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}
```

### Strict Mode Features Enabled

| Feature | Status | Purpose |
|---------|--------|---------|
| strict | ✅ | All strict type-checking options |
| noUnusedLocals | ✅ | Error on unused local variables |
| noUnusedParameters | ✅ | Error on unused parameters |
| noFallthroughCasesInSwitch | ✅ | Error on fallthrough in switch |
| noImplicitAny | ✅ (via strict) | Error on implicit 'any' |
| noImplicitReturns | ⚠️ | Not explicitly enabled |
| noImplicitThis | ✅ (via strict) | Error on implicit 'this' |
| strictNullChecks | ✅ (via strict) | Null/undefined checking |
| strictFunctionTypes | ✅ (via strict) | Strict function type checking |
| strictBindCallApply | ✅ (via strict) | Strict bind/call/apply |
| strictPropertyInitialization | ✅ (via strict) | Property initialization check |

**Assessment:** ✅ **EXCELLENT** - TypeScript strict mode fully enabled

### Web Vitals Rules Included

- ✅ No unused imports
- ✅ No console.error in production
- ✅ No direct DOM manipulation
- ✅ Image optimization warnings
- ✅ Link optimization warnings

**Assessment:** ⚠️ **BASIC** - Only Next.js defaults, no custom rules

### Recommended Enhancements

```json
{
  "extends": [
    "next/core-web-vitals",
    "plugin:@typescript-eslint/recommended",
    "plugin:react/recommended",
    "plugin:jsx-a11y/recommended",
    "prettier"
  ],
  "plugins": [
    "@typescript-eslint",
    "react",
    "react-hooks",
    "jsx-a11y",
    "import"
  ],
  "rules": {
    "react/react-in-jsx-scope": "off",
    "react/prop-types": "off",
    "@typescript-eslint/explicit-function-return-type": "warn",
    "@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any": "warn",
    "jsx-a11y/anchor-is-valid": "error",
    "import/order": ["error", {"groups": ["builtin", "external", "internal"]}]
  }
}
```

### Recommended Testing Setup

#### Frontend Testing

```bash
# Install testing dependencies
npm install -D jest @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom
npm install -D @testing-library/user-event
npm install -D jest-environment-jsdom
```

#### Recommended `jest.config.js`

```javascript
module.exports = {
  testEnvironment: 'jsdom',
  setupFilesAfterEnv: ['<rootDir>/jest.setup.js'],
  moduleNameMapper: {
    '^@/(.*)$': '<rootDir>/src/$1',
  },
  testPathIgnorePatterns: ['<rootDir>/node_modules/', '<rootDir>/.next/'],
  collectCoverageFrom: [
    'src/**/*.{ts,tsx}',
    '!src/**/*.d.ts',
    '!src/**/__tests__/**',
  ],
}
```

#### Python Testing (Already Configured)

```bash
# Run tests in Python services
cd services/recommendation-service
pytest

# With coverage
pytest --cov=. --cov-report=html
```

## Accessibility (a11y) Audit

### Current Status: ⚠️ MINIMAL

| Check | Status | Details |
|-------|--------|---------|
| Semantic HTML | ✅ Partial | nav, main, form tags used |
| ARIA Labels | ⚠️ Minimal | Basic labels present |
| Keyboard Navigation | ❌ Not tested | Unknown |
| Focus Management | ❌ Not implemented | No focus trap detected |
| Color Contrast | ❌ Not audited | Unknown |
| Screen Reader Support | ❌ Not tested | Unknown |
| Reduced Motion | ❌ Not implemented | No media query support |
| Alt Text | ⚠️ Partial | Some images missing alt |
| Form Labels | ✅ Present | All forms have labels |
| Skip Links | ❌ Not implemented | No skip-to-content link |

### Manual Audit of Key Pages

#### Landing Page (`src/app/page.tsx`)

| Element | Status | Issue |
|---------|--------|-------|
| h1 | ✅ Present | "Find Your Perfect Internship" |
| nav | ✅ Semantic | Proper navigation |
| Links | ✅ Accessible | Descriptive text |
| Buttons | ✅ Accessible | Clear labels |
| Images | N/A | Using emoji icons |
| Motion | ⚠️ Warning | No reduced-motion support |

#### Login Page (`src/app/login/page.tsx`)

| Element | Status | Issue |
|---------|--------|-------|
| h1 | ✅ Present | "Welcome Back" |
| Form | ✅ Accessible | Proper labels |
| Inputs | ✅ Accessible | id/for association |
| Error Messages | ✅ Accessible | Visible to screen readers |
| Focus States | ⚠️ Basic | Default browser styles |

#### Register Page (`src/app/register/page.tsx`)

| Element | Status | Issue |
|---------|--------|-------|
| h1 | ✅ Present | "Create Account" |
| Form | ✅ Accessible | Proper labels |
| Inputs | ✅ Accessible | id/for association |
| Select | ✅ Accessible | Proper label |
| Error Messages | ✅ Accessible | Visible to screen readers |

### Recommended Accessibility Improvements

1. **Add skip link:**
   ```tsx
   <a href="#main-content" className="sr-only focus:not-sr-only">
     Skip to main content
   </a>
   ```

2. **Add reduced motion support:**
   ```css
   @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
     *, *::before, *::after {
       animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
       animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
       transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
     }
   }
   ```

3. **Add focus visible styles:**
   ```css
   :focus-visible {
     outline: 2px solid var(--ring);
     outline-offset: 2px;
   }
   ```

4. **Install axe-core for automated testing:**
   ```bash
   npm install -D @axe-core/react
   ```

## Performance Bottlenecks

### Bundle Analysis: ❌ NOT CONFIGURED

**Tools to Consider:**
- `@next/bundle-analyzer`
- `webpack-bundle-analyzer`
- Lighthouse CI

### Current Bundle Estimate

| Category | Size (gzipped) |
|----------|---------------|
| Next.js + React | ~130KB |
| Tailwind CSS | ~10KB (purged) |
| TanStack Query | ~15KB |
| Zustand | ~3KB |
| Framer Motion | ~30KB |
| Axios | ~12KB |
| React Hook Form + Zod | ~15KB |
| **Total** | **~215KB** |

**Assessment:** ✅ **HEALTHY** - Under 250KB initial bundle

### Performance Optimizations Detected

| Optimization | Status |
|--------------|--------|
| Code Splitting | ✅ Automatic (Next.js) |
| Tree Shaking | ✅ ES Modules |
| CSS Purging | ✅ Tailwind content config |
| Image Optimization | ⚠️ Not configured |
| Font Optimization | ⚠️ Google Fonts (Inter) |
| Prefetching | ✅ Next.js link prefetch |

### Recommended Performance Improvements

1. **Add bundle analyzer:**
   ```javascript
   // next.config.js
   const withBundleAnalyzer = require('@next/bundle-analyzer')({
     enabled: process.env.ANALYZE === 'true',
   })
   module.exports = withBundleAnalyzer({})
   ```

2. **Optimize fonts:**
   ```tsx
   // Already using next/font (good!)
   import { Inter } from 'next/font/google'
   ```

3. **Add image optimization:**
   ```tsx
   import Image from 'next/image'
   ```

4. **Implement lazy loading:**
   ```tsx
   const HeavyComponent = dynamic(() => import('./HeavyComponent'), {
     loading: () => <Skeleton />,
   })
   ```

## Recommendations

### Immediate Actions (Phase 3 Prep)

1. **Add Prettier:**

   ```bash
   npm install -D prettier eslint-config-prettier
   ```

2. **Enhance ESLint:**

   ```bash
   npm install -D eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin
   ```

3. **Add accessibility testing:**
   ```bash
   npm install -D @axe-core/react
   ```

### Medium Priority

1. **Add Jest + React Testing Library:**
   ```bash
   npm install -D jest @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom
   ```

2. **Add bundle analyzer:**
   ```bash
   npm install -D @next/bundle-analyzer
   ```

3. **Add Storybook:**
   ```bash
   npm install -D storybook @storybook/react
   ```

### Long Term

1. **Add visual regression testing:** Chromatic
2. **Add E2E testing:** Playwright or Cypress
3. **Add performance monitoring:** Lighthouse CI
4. **Add API documentation:** OpenAPI/Swagger
